title: Spack stack intent (v1)
description: Stack intent file. Platform-portable — names build classes, toolchains, and node selectors that the selected template contract resolves against the profile. Mirrors docs/spack_stack_generation_design_v6.md § stack.yaml.

schema_version.description: Stack schema version. v1 is this file.

name.description: Stack name. Appears in paths and modules.

profile_contract.description: Profile-version contract. Defaulted by the template set when omitted.

schema_version.description: Profile schema version this stack expects. Render rejects mismatched profiles.

templates.description: Which template set to render against.

set.description: Template set name. Matches a directory under templates/.

spack.description: Optional Spack version constraint. Tightens the template set's floor; never widens.

version.description: PEP-440-style constraint or exact version. Enforced by spack-build before any lane runs.

builds.description: Generic build requests. Each request is expanded into one or more resolved lanes at render.

per_system.description: System-scoped narrowing. Keys are profile.system.name values; ignored for non-matching systems. Subset semantics only.

foundation_pins.description: Library version pins for the common scope. Keys are package names; values are exact versions.

package_repositories.description: Internal Spack package repositories to register for this stack. Render emits a repos.yaml scope from this list.

modules_block.description: User-visible module strategy. Normally inherited from stack-defaults.yaml.

format.description: Mandatory baseline. Always tcl in v1.

additional_formats.description: Optional additional module formats (e.g., [lmod] on Lmod sites).

exposure.description: front_door: users load a lane selector first. direct: public package/application modules.

init_module.description: Optional bootstrap/init module name. Null when the public module root is already on MODULEPATH.

module_root.description: User-facing module namespace (e.g., CSE in CSE/GCC/mpi-openmpi).

publish_root.description: Optional existing site MODULEPATH root where public modules are published or symlinked. Absolute path or null.

hierarchy_style.description: Module-tree hierarchy style. Granular is Lmod-only.

expose_provenance.description: Whether setenv STACK_PACKAGE_PROVENANCE is emitted on package modules.

platform_module_policy.description: Whether public entry modules prereq/check platform modules or actively autoload them.

build_request.description: One generic build request. Expanded at render into one or more resolved lanes.

name.description: Request name. Appears as source_build in generated lane manifests.

package_set.description: Filename stem of a package-sets/<name>.yaml. Mutually exclusive with specs.

oneOf.description: Flat list of Spack root spec strings.
Map of spec kind (any, serial, mpi, gpu, ...) to a list of Spack root spec strings.

specs.description: Inline Spack root specs. Either a flat list, or a map keyed by spec kind. Mutually exclusive with package_set. May be null when package_set is set.

expand.description: Expansion rule when multiple matched node types are eligible.

publish.description: Whether public modules/views are generated for lanes from this request.

required.description: When true, an unsatisfied request fails render instead of being skipped.

oneOf.description: Inline specs branch: specs is non-null, package_set absent.
Package-set branch: package_set is set, specs is null or absent.

builds.description: Narrowing per build-request name. Keys must match stack.builds[*].name.

mpi.description: Subset of MPI provider names. List semantics, distinct from externals.mpi (which is a single posture scalar).

gpu_arch.description: Subset of GPU architecture labels from profile.node_types[*].gpu.arch_target.

externals_block.description: Platform-agnostic externals policy. Normally inherited from stack-defaults.yaml.

mpi.description: MPI-externals posture (single posture scalar; distinct from per_system.builds[*].mpi which is a provider list).

buildcache_block.description: Build-cache lane policy. Normally inherited from stack-defaults.yaml.

spack_generation.description: Path-token template separating incompatible Spack/package-repo generations.

foundation_lane.description: Mirror path key template for foundation cache. Only when Core/foundation lanes exist.

payload_lane.description: Mirror path key template for payload cache.

signed.description: Whether buildcache contents are signed. v1 default false; true requires key configuration.

push_after_every_step.description: Whether spack-build pushes to the buildcache after each lane completes.

save_lockfiles.description: Whether spack.lock per lane is copied into releases/<date>/.

retain_previous.description: Number of previous releases to keep loadable.

promotion.description: Whether Ansible swaps the current symlink automatically or waits for approval.

helpers_block.description: Maintainer recommendations on helper use. Recommendations only; the manual workflow remains valid regardless.

path.description: Repository path relative to the stack source root, e.g., package-repos/cse.

priority.description: Resolution priority relative to Spack's builtin repository.
